Vendors & partners

Work with Ossita.

We welcome suppliers, makers, material vendors, logistics partners, and trade collaborators who can support calm, durable furniture for children's spaces.

Contact us B2B projects

What matters

Partners who care about material quality and consistency.

Ossita pieces are designed for children and high-touch rooms, so we look for partners who can meet clear standards without adding unnecessary complexity.

Materials

Natural, durable, well-documented.

Wood, finishes, textiles, hardware, and components should be consistent, safe, and suitable for daily family or institutional use.

Making

Reliable craft and production.

We are open to fabrication, finishing, prototyping, packaging, and specialist production partners with disciplined quality control.

Operations

Careful handling and delivery.

Logistics and service partners should understand furniture handling, installation timing, and customer-facing care.

Trade

Aligned retail and project channels.

We welcome thoughtful retail, interior, school, nursery, and hospitality partners where the audience fits the range.

Partnership areas

Tell us where you can add strength.

Send a focused introduction with your capabilities, location, capacity, lead times, and examples of relevant work.

Supply

Materials and components

Wood, boards, veneers, finishes, textiles, hardware, packaging, and other furniture inputs.

Production

Makers and workshops

Prototype, batch production, joinery, finishing, upholstery, assembly, and quality support.

Channels

Trade and service partners

Retail, interior design, project sourcing, delivery, installation, and after-care collaborators.

How to reach us

Keep the first message practical.

The most useful introductions are specific. A short note with relevant details is better than a broad company profile alone.

1. Introduce

Share what you offer.

Include your company, location, core capability, and the category you believe fits Ossita.

2. Detail

Add constraints and capacity.

Tell us about minimums, lead times, certifications, production limits, and any materials or processes you specialize in.

3. Show

Send relevant examples.

Attach links, references, photos, or samples that show work close to furniture, children's spaces, or premium interiors.

4. Align

We will respond where there is a fit.

If the timing and capability match a current need, we will follow up with next steps and practical requirements.

Supplier and partner enquiries

Have a relevant supply, making, or partnership offer?

Send us a focused introduction and we will route it to the right person.

Contact us
